entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop affected by peanut bud necrosis disease

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnuts caused by a virus and transmitted by thrips

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The virus that causes peanut bud necrosis disease

entities.name: THRIPS PALMI
entities.description: The insect vector that transmits the peanut bud necrosis virus

entities.name: TOSPOVIRUSES
entities.description: A group of viruses to which the peanut bud necrosis virus belongs

entities.name: GENOME STRUCTURE
entities.description: The organization of the genetic material within tospoviruses

entities.name: HOST RANGE
entities.description: The variety of species that a virus can infect

entities.name: TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process by which the virus is spread from one host to another

entities.name: SPREAD
entities.description: The distribution and expansion of the virus in a population

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the patterns, causes, and effects of the disease in populations

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a variety to withstand the vector or the virus
